notes:
- NSIS installer: custom branded sidebar image (164├Ч314 px) and header image (150├Ч57 px)
- NSIS installer: optional desktop shortcut тАФ checkbox page during installation (checked by default)
- Wizard: new License step (step 7/8) тАФ choose between 14-day free trial or activate a Pro key directly during first-launch setup
- License manager: fully responsive layout тАФ sidebar collapses on small screens with a `<` toggle button fixed at bottom-right
- License manager: date picker with enforced minimum тАФ expiry date cannot be before or equal to start date, updates dynamically when start date changes
- License manager: duplicate email protection тАФ server blocks generation if a license already exists for the same email (HTTP 409)
- License manager: Delete button per license in History тАФ removes from local log and revokes activation on Cloudflare Worker
- License manager: History auto-refreshes after each successful key generation (no manual tab switch needed)
- License activation modal: clicking Next no longer closed the modal тАФ modal now stays open on validation error (keepOpen flag)
- License activation modal: errors now display as inline red messages below each field instead of a single bottom message
- License manager: expiry date field min enforced as start + 1 day (previously allowed same-day expiry)
- NSIS installer: previous version is automatically uninstalled before installing the new one тАФ no more duplicate entries in Windows Programs & Features
- NSIS installer: desktop shortcut creation moved from automatic to user-controlled (opt-in checkbox)
- Version bumped to 0.7.0
- `build/installer.nsh`: `customInit` macro reads `HKLM` and `HKCU` registry to detect and silently uninstall previous version before install
- `build/installer.nsh`: `DesktopShortcutPage` / `DesktopShortcutPageLeave` functions handle checkbox state for desktop shortcut
- `package.json`: `installerSidebar`, `uninstallerSidebar`, `installerHeader` fields added pointing to `assets/*.bmp`
- `package.json`: `createDesktopShortcut: false` тАФ shortcut creation delegated to `installer.nsh`
- `server.js`: duplicate email check against `licenses.log` before key generation
- `ui.html`: `loadHistory()` called automatically after successful key generation
- `ui.html`: `FORMAT_WORKER_URL` + `FORMAT_ADMIN_SECRET` read from `.env` via `dotenv` for Cloudflare revocation on delete
